name: Kani Brown
initialNotes: Baseline assessment - Pre-dry fasting cycle. Blood tests available.

symptoms: Cold hands and feet turn blue: 7/10
preDryfastingCycles.notes: Pre-treatment baseline assessment. Blood test link: https://drive.google.com/u/0/open?usp=forms_web&id=1bYEPqRH5Dnw9_3AzA8pWYdlYgXDI4jbu

meetings.summary: Detailed planning for progressive fasts, T3 ramp-up strategy, and pre-fast preparation (Liver/Kidney/Immune).
nextSteps: Start 40h fast on Jan 3 (Saturday night to Sunday)
Acquire Tudca, Potassium Citrate, and Magnesium Citrate for organ protection
Receive T3 (4 bottles) at 26 Oliver Street address
Perform coffee enemas 12h into 3d and 5d fasts
meetings.notes:
Fasting Schedule: Confirmed 40h (Jan 3) -> 1 week break -> 3-day (Jan 11) -> 1 week break -> 5-day (late Jan/Feb 3). 

T3 Therapy: Coach shipping 4 bottles directly (labeled as B-vitamins for customs). Therapy starts after the 5-day fast. Strategy: 'Elevator up' (10mcg increments daily) and 'Staircase down' (wean off every 3 days). 

Preparation: Skipping Keto prep; proceeding with vegan/juicing approach. Immune/Viral prep with Monolaurin (3000mg). Liver/Kidney protection using Tudca and Citrates (preventing stones). 

Refeeding: Emphasis on carb signaling for stem cell activation. Avoid over-hydration post-fast (max 2L/day). Enterosgel recommended for detox during refeed.

meetings.summary: Consultation on fasting strategy, diet preparation, and medication planning.
nextSteps: Create 'Ship By Mail' account for Canadian address forwarding
Switch to vegan/juicing diet for 5 days prior to fasting
Receive T3 medication (4 bottles) from coach
meetings.notes:
Diet Plan: Agreed on vegan smoothie/juicing approach for 5 days pre-fast instead of low carb, as patient is experienced with fasting. 

Fasting Schedule: Progressive build-up strategy reduced to: 40h fast -> 1 week break -> 3-day fast (week of Jan 11) -> 1 week break -> 5-day fast (aiming for Feb 3 target).

Medications: TSH levels at 1.4 but low body temps suggest suppressed metabolism. Plan to run T3 cycle. Coach will ship 4 bottles (~$200 value) to patient via forwarding address.
